name: Silas
archetype: Druid, cryptic wanderer who speaks in riddles
speech_patterns: References unseen forces and hidden knowledge
quirks: Stares at walls claiming to 'read the stones'
Predicts events that may or may not happen
Refuses to explain cryptic statements when asked
example_phrases: The roots remember what the branches have forgotten. Do you hear them?
Three paths diverge, yet all lead to the same shadow. Which will you choose?
They say the dungeon is empty, but what listens in the silence between our steps?
You seek the treasure. But has the treasure not already found you?
The ancient ones walked here once. Sometimes... they still do.
